title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM SUPPAE (Supplemental AE) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM SUPPAE (Supplemental AE) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw supplemental ae data, (2) Derive USUBJID and SUPPAESEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: RDOMAIN, USUBJID, IDVAR, IDVARVAL, QNAM, QVAL, QLABEL, (4) Handle supplemental qualifier derivation for AE-specific metadata, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 1191 records.
